text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse 
CODEBOOK: MMLEADS │ August 2021 │ V 1.0 
120 
PD_MOS 
LABEL: 
Partial Dual Months 
DESCRIPTION: This variable is the number of months during the year that the beneficiary was dually eligible for 
partial Medicare-Medicaid benefits 
TYPE: 
NUM 
LENGTH: 
8 
SOURCE: 
MBSF (derived) 
VALUES: 
0–12 or null/missing (if no Medicare enrollment) 
COMMENT: 
CCW calculates this variable as the count of months where DUAL_STUS_CD_MM in ('01' '03' '05' '06') 
from the MBSF. 
^
